name: agent-velocity
installHints: AiPlus Agent Velocity adds AI-native time estimation: it tracks estimated vs actual time per task, learns model + task-type bias, and surfaces calibrated p50/p90 estimates over time.
Functionality is exposed via the built-in `aiplus velocity` subcommand. This module ships the schemas + design docs that runtimes can reference locally.
Run `aiplus velocity init` in a project to start tracking. Then `aiplus velocity estimate` before a task and `aiplus velocity complete` after.
